name: Fruit-Glazed Roasted Pork-Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 Pork chops, 2 inches thick, lean, boneless ("Butterfly" chops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brown both sides of chops quickly in hot cooking oil.
3. Place pork chops in a shallow roasting pan and cook for 40 minutes.
4. Garlic-flavored cooking oil is made by immersing peeled garlic cloves in vegetable cooking oil the day before use.
5. Stir all GLAZE ingredients together well and let stand to blend while chops are roasting.
6. After 40 minutes, remove chops from oven and brush glaze on both sides of the chops.
7. Return chops to oven and continue cooking for an additional 35 to 45 minutes, basting every 15 minutes until meat is thoroughly cooked.
8. Remove pork chops to serving platter and serve hot.
